use_cases: Monitoring service health and incident frequency across infrastructure
Tracking incident trends for platform reliability reporting
Displaying operational metrics for on-call and devops teams
Visualizing SLA compliance data across multiple services
ai_summary: A dark-themed analytics bar chart component for visualizing incident reports across multiple services, built with reaviz library. Displays incident counts with colorful gradient bars on a black background, designed for dashboard integration in monitoring and incident management applications.
